metadata.description: Plugins produit — specs, analytics PostHog, gestion de bugs et maintenance des plugins

plugins.name: spec
plugins.description: Adds a /spec to help you write structured product specs

plugins.name: data
plugins.description: Adds /posthog-dashboard and /kpi-generator to analyze product usage and define KPIs

plugins.name: bug
plugins.description: Adds a /slack-to-notion-bug to create Notion tickets from Slack messages

plugins.name: upkeep
plugins.description: Adds /plugin-linter to audit Claude Code plugins and marketplaces against official best practices
